Using APOGEE DR17 data, the excess mutual information between the dynamic and chemical parameters of stars was computed, allowing the extraction of dynamic, chemical, and cross contributions. Radial memory profiles were constructed, and dimensionless diagnostics were introduced — a dominance coefficient and coupling efficiency. It is shown that up to ~20 kpc, memory of different types evolves in distinct ways, and then all profiles converge to a common statistically significant residual. The measured memory exceeds the random background by many times, confirming its astrophysical nature. The surviving information is predominantly dynamic, with a finite preserved chemodynamic coupling. The results indicate that phase mixing redistributes rather than erases the memory of the galaxy's formation, and introduce halo memory as a new tool for galactic archaeology, providing a unified statistical framework for observations and cosmological simulations.
threads: Оказывается, звёздное гало не забывает. Гравитационное перемешивание не стирает, а перераспределяет информацию о слияниях, будто переписывает старую мелодию в новом ритме. Избыточная взаимная информация позволяет услышать исходную тему — и она звучит даже на окраинах. Когда-нибудь этот подход поможет восстановить симфонию других галактик, приближая разгадку тёмной материи.

title: AT 2019ijn: Off-Axis Relativistic Jet from a Tidal Disruption Event
oneliner: The unique radio transient AT 2019ijn, unearthed in the VLASS survey, hints at an ultra-rare event: a star torn apart by a black hole, launching a powerful jet we see off-axis.
description: AT 2019ijn is a bright optical flash and a long-lived radio source tied to a star-forming dwarf galaxy. The optical outburst—rapid rise, slow fade—is paired with delayed radio emission explained as an off-axis jet packing ~2×10⁵² erg. The most likely culprit: a tidal disruption event (TDE) by an int
abstract: We present transient AT 2019ijn, discovered in the radio band. It is associated with a powerful relativistic jet observed off-axis and a luminous optical flare (νLν,opt ~10⁴⁴ erg/s). The source resides in a star-forming dwarf galaxy at z=0.273. The optical light curve shows a fast rise (t_rise,rest ~7 days) and slow decline (t_dec,rest >38 days). A year later, a radio counterpart was detected with energy ~2×10⁵² erg, persisting for over 6 years. The combination of properties excludes known classes of core-collapse explosions. Possible scenarios include an exotic black hole–star merger or a tidal disruption event (TDE) of a star by a black hole of 10⁴–10⁶ M⊙ with jet launching. TDE is favored. The low redshift allows us to constrain the late-time evolution, providing new insights into the occurrence rate of such jets. Future radio surveys will open a new window for finding similar off-axis relativistic transients.
threads: Каждый день чёрные дыры разрывают звёзды и выбрасывают лучи энергии. Но мы видим лишь те, что направлены на нас. AT 2019ijn — редкий случай, когда прожектор смотрел мимо, и мы услышали радиоэхо. Это словно уловить шёпот, когда кто-то кричит в другую сторону. Научившись ловить такие события, мы составим карту невидимых катастроф. А может, и услышим внеземные сигналы.

title: Self-Assembly of Dodecagonal Quasicrystals in Dipolar Bose–Einstein Condensates with Optical Feedback
oneliner: Dipolar Bose–Einstein condensates with optical feedback spontaneously form dodecagonal quasicrystals boasting twelve-fold symmetry.
description: This study proposes and theoretically backs a method for creating self-assembling quasicrystals in a dipolar Bose–Einstein condensate. By pairing up intrinsic dipole-dipole forces with photon-mediated interactions from a single-mirror Fabry–Pérot optical feedback setup, two roton minima emerge in th
abstract: Competing interactions with incommensurate characteristic lengths in a dipolar Bose-Einstein condensate can give rise to quasicrystalline structures lacking translational periodicity. It is shown that combining direct dipole-dipole interaction and photon-mediated interaction, induced by coupling to an excited state and precisely tuned optical feedback, creates two roton minima in the Bogoliubov excitation spectrum. This leads to the emergence of a stable phase of a dodecagonal quasicrystal with rotational symmetry of order 12, achievable under realistic experimental parameters. Additionally, a dynamic protocol for obtaining such states and a universal numerical method for calculating their collective excitations have been developed.
threads: Представьте гобелен, который никогда не повторяется, но излучает совершенный порядок. В 1984 году такие узоры обнаружили в сплавах; теперь их выращивают в квантовом газе. Два ротона — наследие Ландау — ведут атомы диспрозия в танце с фотонами, рождая кристалл с симметрией 12, запрещённой для обычной материи. И он течёт, оставаясь сверхтекучим. Первый шаг к рукотворным квазивселенным.

title: The Role of Wide Stellar Pairs in the Formation of Hot Jupiters around M Dwarfs
oneliner: Statistical analysis shows that having a distant stellar companion increases the odds of finding a hot Jupiter around a red dwarf sixfold, pointing to the key role of high-eccentricity migration.
description: The discovery of giant planet TOI-5628Ab with a 4.34-day period orbiting an M dwarf with a white dwarf companion at ~2500 au is reported. A systematic search for co-moving stellar companions around all M dwarfs with confirmed short-period giants revealed a multiplicity of 34.2±9.5%, six times higher
abstract: The influence of wide-orbit stellar companions on the formation of hot Jupiters around M-dwarfs remains unclear. We present the discovery of TOI-5628Ab: a giant planet with a period of 4.34 days, a radius of 0.74±0.04 R_J, and an upper mass limit of 0.22 M_J (3σ) orbiting a star of 0.36 M☉, along with a white dwarf companion of 0.59±0.16 M☉ at a projected separation of ~2500 AU. Using Gaia DR3 data, we performed a systematic search for comoving companions (100–10,000 AU) for all M-dwarfs with confirmed short-period giants (P<10 d, R>0.7 R_J) and a matched control sample of field M-stars. The multiplicity fraction among planet hosts was 34.2±9.5%, roughly 6 times higher than among field stars (5.3±3.7%). These results indicate that wide companions promote the formation of short-period giants around M-stars with masses 0.21–0.64 M☉, with high-eccentricity migration being a likely key mechanism.
threads: Красный карлик и его мёртвый близнец управляют планетой-гигантом, словно марионеткой. Гравитационный дирижёр заставляет планету нырять к звезде, раскачивая орбиту до чудовищного эллипса. Шансы найти такую систему возрастают в шесть раз, когда есть «кукловод». Roman скоро позволит увидеть тени других невидимых дирижёров — и мы, возможно, обнаружим множество двойных миров с мёртвыми солнцами.

title: Training dynamics of autoencoders: transient scaling and emergent concepts in the Ising model
oneliner: Unsupervised neural networks uncover magnetization and energy in spin configurations, revealing two learning regimes controlled by hyperparameters.
description: The study reveals how autoencoders trained on microscopic spin configurations of the Ising model autonomously extract macroscopic variables. Analysis at different spatial scales uncovers two dynamical regimes: early dominance of magnetization and a later shift to an energy regime. Network depth, wid
abstract: It is investigated how unsupervised autoencoders, trained on microscopic spin configurations of the Ising model, extract macroscopic variables relevant to physical theory. Without prior domain knowledge, learning was studied at different spatial scales. Two dynamical regimes were identified, governed by the main hyperparameters (depth, width of network, learning rate): a magnetization-dominated regime — transient, with dynamic scaling and scale-ordered fluctuations; and an energy-dominated regime — gradually shifting resolution to smaller scales. Deep models at moderate and high rates 'stall', failing to reach these regimes. Through analysis of recursive dynamical trajectories, it is shown that prediction errors generate flow fields with common topology across all representation spaces. A dynamical viewpoint on learning is advanced: a process driven by fluctuations in training data and optimizer far from equilibrium, providing an interpretive framework connecting the physical world and machine models.
threads: Нейросеть учится на вихрях спинов, словно археолог в пустыне. Сперва проступают контуры — намагниченность. Потом, слой за слоем, — тонкие корреляции энергии. Но глубокие модели, как нетерпеливый копатель, застывают на полпути. Так рождаются концепты: сначала грубый эскиз, затем детали. Возможно, и наш мозг строит картину мира точно так же — от крупных форм к нюансам.

title: Evolution of AI in Nanoparticle Microscopy: From Interpretation to Scientific Inference
oneliner: Machine learning turns electron microscopy into a predictive materials science tool.
description: Overview of modern artificial intelligence methods for electron microscopy of nanoparticles. Covers detection, segmentation, atomic-resolution restoration, and 3D structural reconstruction. Shows how deep learning is moving from image analysis to extracting physically meaningful information, acceler
abstract: The review examines artificial intelligence methods for nanoparticle characterization using electron microscopy: TEM, HRTEM, STEM, and in situ TEM. It analyzes key tasks: detection, segmentation, quantitative morphology assessment, atomic resolution restoration, defect identification, transition from 2D images to 3D structures, and analysis of dynamic processes. Computational approaches are covered from classical machine learning and convolutional neural networks to transformers, self-supervised learning, foundation models, multimodal AI, and physics-informed learning. Integration of microscopy data with simulations, metadata, and autonomous experiments is considered for linking structure, dynamics, synthesis conditions, and functional properties. The advantages, limitations, and data requirements of existing methods are critically evaluated. Perspectives on foundation models, AI-driven microscopy, and closed-loop experiments for autonomous materials discovery are discussed.
threads: Алгоритм за секунду находит сотни наночастиц — у человека ушли бы часы. Электронный микроскоп становится дирижёром атомного оркестра: нейросети извлекают из дрожания пикселей партитуру скрытых сил. На горизонте — автономные приборы, которые сами решают, куда направить пучок, и синтезируют материалы быстрее, чем выходят научные статьи.

title: Photon Decay into Neutrinos: New Frontiers of Lorentz Invariance
oneliner: Superluminal photons from the Crab Nebula might decay into neutrinos, paving the way to test a fundamental symmetry.
description: Astrophysical observations of petaelectronvolt gamma rays by the LHAASO observatory allow testing for Lorentz invariance violations. The decay of a superluminal photon into a neutrino-antineutrino pair, forbidden in standard theory, becomes possible if the photon acquires an effective mass due to a
abstract: We consider the vacuum decay of a photon into a neutrino-antineutrino pair under Lorentz invariance violation (LIV). LIV corrections to the photon dispersion are set by an effective invariant mass, which kinematically allows the normally forbidden γ→νν̄. The decay proceeds through a one-loop electromagnetic neutrino vertex in the Standard Model and is highly suppressed. Using the anapole form factor (small q²), the rate is computed for TeV-PeV photons. Results: below the e⁺e⁻ threshold, the neutrino channel is open but too rare to improve constraints. Above the threshold, if e⁺e⁻ production is suppressed by the relative photon-electron LIV parameter, the neutrino decay gives an independent bound on the photon-neutrino LIV coupling parameters.
threads: Фотоны с энергией в миллиард раз выше видимого света могут незаметно обгонять сами себя и распадаться на пару нейтрино. Это будто свет отбрасывает тень, которая крадёт его энергию. Телескоп LHAASO уже ловит такие кванты из Крабовидной туманности. Возможно, скоро мы заметим «пропажу» фотонов — и тогда лоренц-инвариантность, фундамент теории Эйнштейна, даст первую трещину.

title: Growth, Bending, and Swirling: How Polymerizing Filaments Generate Motion
oneliner: Theory shows that the growth of biopolymers on a microparticle surface makes it swim, rotate, or move in a spiral—without any molecular motors.
description: In the microworld, where viscosity dominates over inertia, microorganisms use clever tricks for locomotion. One such trick is the polymerization push: the growth of filaments anchored to the cell surface creates forces that propel the organism forward. Researchers developed a mathematical model of a
abstract: A continuum model has been developed for motion at low Reynolds numbers, where active forces emerge self-consistently from nucleation, growth, catastrophes, and hydrodynamic interactions of polymerizing surface filaments. It is analytically shown that polymerization-induced compressive forces trigger a long-wavelength buckling instability, leading to spontaneous symmetry breaking of the filament carpet and large-scale flows. When the model is coupled to a force- and torque-free spheroidal body, diverse regimes appear—spontaneous rotation, directed motion, and chiral swimming—selected by the spatial arrangement of growing filaments. These results establish a general theoretical framework for motility driven by the collective dynamics of polymerizing filaments and suggest new principles for designing synthetic microswimmers.
threads: В микроскопическом мире, где вода густая как мёд, бактерии придумали двигаться, просто отращивая хвосты. Но настоящая магия начинается, когда тысячи таких хвостов на поверхности сферы начинают изгибаться и закручивать воду в вихри. Так сфера превращается в крошечный летающий ковёр, который может вращаться, плыть прямо или ввинчиваться в среду — и всё без единого мотора. Это открывает путь к программируемым микророботам и, возможно, к поиску жизни на других планетах по следам

title: Explosive Molecular Flows: Traces of Dynamic Catastrophes in the Birth of Massive Stars
oneliner: The discovery of a new class of explosive-like molecular outflows points to dramatic collisions and mergers of protostars in dense clusters.
description: About 15 years ago, astronomers confirmed the existence of extreme molecular outflows, dubbed explosive. Unlike classical bipolar jets, they consist of many thin straight filaments flying apart almost isotropically with kinematics resembling the expansion of the Universe. The energy of these events
abstract: About 15 years ago, a new type of extreme molecular outflow was confirmed, with kinetic energy ~10⁴⁷⁻⁴⁹ erg, associated with very bright (>10⁵ L⊙) and massive (~10³ M⊙) young clusters — explosive molecular outflows. Unlike bipolar protostellar flows, they exhibit an almost isotropic distribution of many narrow, straight filamentary streamers with clear Hubble-like expansion. These filaments point toward the center of expanding molecular or ionized shells with velocities of 10–50 km/s, but young massive stars are not observed there — they have likely shifted away. The characteristics indicate a short duration and origin from a single powerful destructive event. The most modern model explains them by the disruption of non-hierarchical massive protostellar systems, where components can either form a close binary (separations of a few AU) or merge into a single massive star, as recently proposed for the nearest star-forming region, Orion BN/KL.
threads: Пятьсот лет назад в туманности Ориона столкнулись две (или больше) протозвёзды. Удар породил веер из молекулярных струй, которые до сих пор летят со скоростью 350 км/с — и, словно галактики после Большого взрыва, ускоряются по мере удаления от центра. Энергию дала гравитация. Такие космические ДТП случаются раз в 140 лет и, возможно, объясняют, как зажигаются самые массивные звёзды.

title: Controlled Criticality: How Screening Changes the Rules of Quantum Phase Transitions
oneliner: Physicists have separated the spatial and temporal aspects of the quantum Hall transition, showing that screening of the Coulomb interaction changes dynamics but not structure.
description: In strongly interacting quantum systems, phase transitions are often described by universal critical exponents. However, until now it remained unclear how screening affects the individual components of critical behavior—spatial and temporal. A team of scientists from India, Japan, and Israel used du
abstract: In continuous electronic phase transitions, Coulomb interactions alter the relationship between length, energy, and temperature, making it difficult to isolate their impact on spatial and dynamic criticality. Two improvements are proposed: joint temperature and current scaling to separately extract the dynamic exponent z and the localization length exponent γ, and the use of graphene devices with a double graphite gate, where the effective screening radius is tuned geometrically via the ratio of magnetic length to gate distance. Temperature scaling yields a combined exponent κ ≈ 0.21 in the screened regime and ≈ 0.41 in the unscreened regime; combining it with current scaling shows that z changes from ≈1 to ≈2, while γ remains around 2.4. Thus, gate-controlled screening selectively modifies the dynamic sector of the transition without affecting spatial criticality. Geometric screening becomes a universal tool for controlling interactions and separating disorder and correlation effects in two-dimensional systems, including the fractional quantum Hall effect and moiré materials.
threads: Оказывается, в квантовом мире пространство и время можно настраивать порознь. Физики научились менять темп электронного танца, не касаясь его фигур — словно хореограф ускоряет ритм, сохраняя па. Такой контроль открывает путь к точной инженерии квантовых материалов и, возможно, к созданию «реостатов» для самой реальности.

title: Time crystal on Rydberg atoms lives 17 hours
oneliner: Chinese physicists have created a continuous time crystal in an ensemble of Rydberg atoms, achieving a record lifetime of 16.95 hours.
description: Researchers from USTC observed ultra-long phase coherence in a nonequilibrium phase that spontaneously breaks continuous time-translation symmetry. Using three-photon excitation and radiofrequency modulation in cesium vapor, they stabilized a limit cycle, suppressing dissipation to record levels. A
abstract: Continuous time crystals are a nonequilibrium quantum phase that spontaneously breaks time-translation symmetry without periodic driving, manifesting as stable, long-lived oscillations. Their lifetime is typically limited by the instability of the limit cycle at the edge between nonlinear feedback and dissipation. We experimentally realized an ultralong-lived time crystal using Rydberg atoms in a controlled dissipative many-body system. Long-range interactions and a specially engineered dissipative environment suppress heating and decay. The key factor is closing the Liouvillian gap and achieving a nearly zero real part of the Liouvillian spectrum. Oscillation duration exceeded 16.95 hours—orders of magnitude longer than all known counterparts. This result provides a robust platform for exploring autonomous nonequilibrium phases and opens prospects for quantum sensing and continuous quantum information processing.
threads: Ритм, не стихающий 17 часов — дольше светового дня. Этот квантовый метроном бьётся, словно сердце, нашедшее резонанс с самим пульсом космоса. Мы учимся создавать память, которая не забывает, и сенсоры, чувствующие дыхание невидимых миров.

title: Neutrino Growth of Primordial Black Holes: Revisiting Mass Evolution in the Early Universe
oneliner: The study shows that primordial black holes can absorb neutrinos and significantly increase their mass during the radiation era, affecting their observability.
description: The classical view that primordial black holes (PBHs) do not gain mass in a radiation-dominated universe has been revised. An analysis of the primordial plasma kinetics revealed that neutrinos can be absorbed by PBHs with masses from 10^3 to 10^9 solar masses when the neutrino mean free path exceeds
abstract: A new picture of primordial black hole mass evolution via neutrino absorption is proposed. Using a semiclassical approach and analysis of early plasma kinetics, the thermal neutrino absorption by a population of primordial black holes in the mass range of 10^{-3} to 10^9 solar masses is recalculated. A significant mass gain is shown for intermediate and supermassive holes, altering the predicted peak of electron-positron pair annihilation in the universe's thermal history. Depending on the collapse fraction, an additional peak in the mass distribution may appear at intermediate values. Since black holes accrete thermal neutrinos, the fraction of dark matter contained in primordial black holes is also revised. These results update previous notions and are essential for interpreting observational dark matter data.
threads: Нейтрино — космические фантомы, проходящие сквозь световой год свинца как сквозь туман. Но в кипящем котле ранней Вселенной их незримый ливень был столь густ, что утолял голод первичных чёрных дыр, превращая их из песчинок в горы. И возможно, именно эти древние исполины — та самая тёмная материя, что прячет лицо мироздания.

title: How Machine Learning Accelerates Self-Consistency in Electronic Structure: A Warm Start for DFTB
oneliner: Using element-specific models, researchers cut self-consistency iterations in DFTB by up to 84%.
description: Self-consistent charge calculations in semi-empirical methods like DFTB often suffer from slow convergence, especially for complex systems. A team from the Fritz Haber Institute applied machine learning to accurately predict initial atomic charges using local environment descriptors and kernel ridge
abstract: The semi-empirical DFTB (Density-Functional Tight-Binding) method is effective for modeling molecules and materials while retaining access to electronic properties, but charge self-consistency (SCC) can require many iterations, especially for complex systems. A machine learning method is proposed that predicts initial atomic charges to accelerate SCC convergence. Separate models are trained for each element using the SOAP (Smooth Overlap of Atomic Positions) descriptor and kernel ridge regression, based on reference calculations. Testing on organic molecules, biomolecules, water clusters, transition metal oxides, and solid electrolytes showed that ML-predicted initial charges consistently and significantly reduce the number of iterations. The approach lowers the computational barrier for large-scale screening and dynamic simulations, making DFTB more practical for high-throughput tasks.
threads: Атомные заряды — как настроечные колки в молекулярном оркестре. Без верной инициализации самосогласование тянет бесконечную какофонию. ML учит каждый элемент играть с листа: для оксидов никеля время «настройки» сократилось на 84%. Это шаг к тому, чтобы симуляции материалов стали почти мгновенными, превратив дизайн катализаторов и батарей в рутинную задачу.

title: The Scalar Charge of Black Holes in the Dance of Gravitational Waves: What LISA Will See
oneliner: Neglecting post-adiabatic corrections distorts system parameters, but doesn't prevent measuring the scalar charge at moderate mass ratios.
description: Bayesian recovery analysis of LISA signals for systems with intermediate and extreme mass ratios showed that the first post-adiabatic order (1PA) in the gravitational sector is critical for estimating masses and the orbit, while the scalar charge remains robust for ϵ ≲ 10⁻⁴. Using purely Einsteinian
abstract: We constructed the first signal model for intermediate and extreme mass-ratio inspirals in theories with scalar fields, including post-adiabatic orbital evolution based on self-force. For quasi-circular inspirals into a non-rotating massive black hole, the gravitational sector at 1PA order is combined with leading scalar effects. Bayesian analysis of injections under LISA conditions showed that neglecting 1PA corrections biases the binary parameter estimates, but the scalar charge remains robust across a wide mass range. Applying pure GR templates to signals with a charged secondary body causes strong biases and underestimated uncertainties due to unaccounted correlations. The spin of the secondary body, down to a mass ratio of $10^{-4}$, is unconstrained even without scalar fields, contrary to previous work. Scalar emission at leading dipolar post-Newtonian order introduces negligible systematic errors compared to full relativistic fluxes.
threads: 100 тысяч витков — словно граммофонная пластинка, на которой медленно проступает скрытая дорожка. Игнорируя обертоны, мы теряем детали оркестровки, но основной мотив остаётся чистым. Скалярный заряд чёрных дыр — это тихий шёпот новых измерений; LISA сможет его уловить даже в несовершенной записи. Когда-нибудь так мы настроимся на тёмную энергию, как на забытую радиостанцию.

title: The Rocket Effect of Domain Walls: Vacuum Mass Asymmetry Changes the Picture
oneliner: A mass difference in the scalar field across vacuums propels domain walls like rockets, accelerating the decay of their network.
description: New research shows that domain walls — topological defects separating regions with distinct vacuum states — can emit scalar radiation anisotropically if the excitation masses in the two vacuums differ. This 'rocket effect' generates a recoil force, pushing the walls toward the heavier vacuum and hel
abstract: The dynamics of domain walls in scalar field theories with degenerate vacua, where the scalar field's mass depends on the vacuum state, is investigated. Through analytical arguments and numerical simulations, it is shown that this dependence leads to anisotropic emission of scalar radiation from walls—predominantly into the region with lower field mass. The resulting recoil effect (reactive acceleration) creates a dynamical bias in the evolution of cosmological domain wall networks, favoring the vacuum with lower mass and promoting network decay. It is demonstrated that the mass dependence on the vacuum, rather than potential barrier asymmetry, is the main factor driving the biased evolution of walls in theories with degenerate vacua. In the more general case of non-degenerate vacua, this recoil mechanism acts as an additional source of dynamical bias, capable of accelerating or decelerating network decay compared to standard predictions based solely on vacuum energy density differences.
threads: Невидимые плёнки толщиной с атомное ядро могли бы разорвать Вселенную. Но природа включила ракетный двигатель: если массы квантов по разные стороны отличаются, стенка испускает асимметричное излучение и дрейфует, как ракета, расширяя лёгкий вакуум и уничтожая сеть. Гравитационные волны от этих катаклизмов донесут до нас информацию о физике за пределами Стандартной модели.

title: Neutron Force on Proton Vortices in the Cores of Neutron Stars
oneliner: Taking into account the Fermi-liquid interaction between neutrons and protons reveals a new force component acting on proton vortices in superconducting neutron stars.
description: In the cores of neutron stars, protons transition into a superconducting state, forming quantum vortices that carry magnetic flux. Traditionally, it was thought that the force on these vortices comes from electron scattering off the magnetic field. This work shows that the normal neutron component a
abstract: In the superconducting matter of neutron stars, which consists of neutrons, protons, and electrons, the forces acting on a proton vortex are studied. Alongside the well-known force due to electron scattering by the vortex's magnetic field, an additional effect from normal neutrons is discovered, caused by Fermi-liquid interactions in the neutron-proton subsystem. Using a kinetic approach based on Landau's Fermi-liquid theory, it is shown that neutron quasiparticles scatter off the proton vortex via the spatially varying condensate momentum, creating a longitudinal force proportional to the relative velocity between neutrons and the vortex. Unlike the electron contribution, this force has no transverse component and vanishes in the absence of neutron-proton Fermi-liquid interactions. Within a simple model, the main properties of the force are analyzed, and physically justified estimates of its magnitude are provided.
threads: Представьте протонные вихри сёрферами на магнитных волнах. Раньше считалось, что их толкают только электроны. Но теперь открылся попутный ветер — нейтроны дуют в спину. Эта тихая сила может объяснить загадочные вспышки магнитаров и дрожь пульсаров. Кто знает, куда заведёт нас эта космическая гидродинамика?
